title: Lean Startup Cycle Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Lean Startup Cycle skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

statement_core_business.description: Statement of the core business hypotheses underlying the product or feature

definition_target_customer.description: Definition of the target customer segment for initial testing

proposed_success_metrics.description: Proposed success metrics and measurement approach

minimum_viable_product.description: Minimum viable product concept or experiment design

existing_customer_behavioral.description: Existing customer behavioral data that can reduce the number of hypotheses requiring active testing

competitive_benchmarks_calibrate.description: Competitive benchmarks to calibrate what "validated" looks like for key metrics
